description: .NET version upgrade plan from net8.0 to net10.0 for eShopOnWeb

tasks.reason: The user explicitly requested an upgrade to .NET 10. Additionally, .NET 8 LTS support ends November 2026, making proactive migration to .NET 10 LTS (supported until November 2028) the right approach to ensure continued security patches, performance improvements, and long-term supportability.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade all 10 projects in the eShopOnWeb solution from net8.0 to net10.0. This includes: updating the central TargetFramework property in Directory.Packages.props from net8.0 to net10.0; updating the SDK version in global.json from 8.0.x to 10.0.x; updating all NuGet package versions (ASP.NET Core 8.x, Entity Framework Core 8.x, Azure SDK, and other dependencies) to their net10.0-compatible equivalents in Directory.Packages.props; and resolving any breaking API changes or deprecations introduced between .NET 8 and .NET 10. All source and test projects must build successfully and all tests must pass on .NET 10.
